# Known private v6 (cidr list matching)

**Dataset**: `gx_10_conn` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IP / CIDR matching with incidr and the is_* address helpers. Known private v6.

```sql
dataset = gx_10_conn | filter is_ipv6(src_ip) = true | alter v6_private = is_known_private_ipv6(src_ip) | fields src_ip, v6_private | sort asc src_ip
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
